subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turning thy face to God! Thy letter was received. From its contents it became known that thy wish is to serve the poor.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه الی الله نامه ات رسید از مضمون معلوم گردید که آرزوی خدمت فقرا داری
subcodes.subjects: @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
